title: SlyLog / Forecast Accuracy
description: How good are the forecasts we act on? Graded once valid_at passes. Temp truth = house OAT sensor; rain/wind truth = Open-Meteo current analysis (no local gauge yet). Fills in as data accrues.

panels.title: Headline skill (rolling 7 d, all lead hours)

targets.rawSql: SELECT temp_mae_house AS "temp MAE vs house °C", temp_bias_house AS "temp bias °C", temp_mae_obs AS "temp MAE vs obs °C", precip_hit_rate AS "rain hit rate", precip_false_alarm_rate AS "rain false-alarm rate", wind_mae AS "wind MAE km/h" FROM forecast_headline_7d

panels.title: Temperature error by lead time (rolling 7 d)

targets.rawSql: SELECT lpad(lead_hours::text, 2, '0') AS "lead h", round(temp_mae_house::numeric, 2)::float AS "MAE vs house", round(temp_mae_obs::numeric, 2)::float AS "MAE vs obs", round(temp_bias_house::numeric, 2)::float AS "bias (house)" FROM forecast_skill_7d ORDER BY lead_hours

panels.title: Wind speed / gust MAE by lead time (rolling 7 d)

targets.rawSql: SELECT lpad(lead_hours::text, 2, '0') AS "lead h", round(wind_mae::numeric, 1)::float AS "wind MAE", round(gust_mae::numeric, 1)::float AS "gust MAE" FROM forecast_skill_7d ORDER BY lead_hours

panels.title: Rolling skill trend (daily MAE, all lead hours pooled)

targets.rawSql: SELECT day AS time, round(temp_mae_house::numeric, 2)::float AS "temp MAE house", round(temp_mae_obs::numeric, 2)::float AS "temp MAE obs", round(wind_mae::numeric, 1)::float AS "wind MAE" FROM forecast_skill_daily WHERE $__timeFilter(day) ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Precip contingency (prob ≥50% vs observed ≥0.5 mm) — the garden's key numbers

targets.rawSql: SELECT '7d' AS "window", sum(precip_hits) AS hits, sum(precip_false_alarms) AS "false alarms", sum(precip_misses) AS misses, sum(precip_correct_negatives) AS "correct negatives", round((sum(precip_hits)::numeric / nullif(sum(precip_hits) + sum(precip_misses), 0)) * 100, 0) AS "hit rate %", round((sum(precip_false_alarms)::numeric / nullif(sum(precip_hits) + sum(precip_false_alarms), 0)) * 100, 0) AS "false-alarm rate %" FROM forecast_skill_7d UNION ALL SELECT '30d', sum(precip_hits), sum(precip_false_alarms), sum(precip_misses), sum(precip_correct_negatives), round((sum(precip_hits)::numeric / nullif(sum(precip_hits) + sum(precip_misses), 0)) * 100, 0), round((sum(precip_false_alarms)::numeric / nullif(sum(precip_hits) + sum(precip_false_alarms), 0)) * 100, 0) FROM forecast_skill_30d
